title: Subscriptions Everywhere
scenario: Friends keep recommending new streaming, food-delivery and gym memberships. Half a year in, it's tempting to 'upgrade your life'. How do you handle it?

choices.label: Subscribe to it all — you earn now
choices.lesson: Lifestyle creep is the silent budget killer. Recurring 'small' charges add up to a big monthly leak that never shows up as one painful bill.

choices.label: Pick one, invest the rest
choices.lesson: Redirecting even small recurring spends into investments turns lifestyle inflation into long-term growth.
